name: Crispy Chicken with Asparagus Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Asparagus Soup (10 3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Prep Time: 10 minutes. Cook Time: 20 minutes.
1. In a shallow dish, dip chicken into egg; coat with bread crumbs.
2. In a skillet over medium-low heat, in hot oil, cook chicken for 15 minutes or until browned on both sides and no longer pink. Remove; keep warm. Pour off fat.
3. In the same skillet over low heat, combine soup, milk, and water. Heat through, stirring occasionally. Serve over chicken with parsleyed rice. Garnish with cherry tomatoes if desired. Serves 4
